message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title TCPClient::connectToServer(string ipAddress, int port)

actor "UC1" as UC1
participant "TCPClient" as TC
participant "clientStructure" as CS

note right of CS: object of sockaddr_in

UC1 -> TC: connectToServer(ipAddress, port)

activate TC
note right of TC: create a socket
TC -> TC: socket_ = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);

opt [socket_ == -1]
    TC --> UC1: return -1 (socket create faild)
end

TC -> CS: clientStructure()
activate CS
TC -> TC: clientStructure.sin_family = AF_INET;
TC -> TC: clientStructure.sin_port = htons(port);

note left of TC: linking ipAddress to clientstructure\nusing AF_INET standart
TC -> TC: inet_pton(AF_INET, ipAddress.c_str(),\n&clientStructure.sin_addr);
TC -> TC: connectRes = connect(socket_, (sockaddr*)&clientStructure,\nsizeof(clientStructure));

opt [connectRes == -1]
    TC --> UC1: return -1 (faild to connect)
end

CS -x> CS
deactivate CS
TC --> UC1: return 0 (connected)
deactivate TC

@enduml
```
